summary: Backend testing completed for POS Events Webhook API. All required functionality working correctly including event validation, authentication, logging, and error handling.
passed_tests: POST /api/pos/events endpoint exists and accepts valid payload
Authentication with X-API-Key header works correctly
Invalid event_type returns proper error with list of valid events

All 11 valid POS event types accepted (new_order_customer, new_order_outlet, order_confirmed, order_ready_customer, item_ready, order_served, item_served, order_ready_delivery, order_dispatched, send_bill_manual, send_bill_auto)
Events are logged to pos_event_logs collection (event_id returned)
Returns appropriate message when no template is configured
Proper error handling for missing/invalid API keys
Response structure includes success, message, and data fields
